/usr/bin/ar qc libKasumi.a CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/alphablt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/blitter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/blt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/blt_reference.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/blt_reference_pal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/blt_reference_rgb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/blt_reference_yuv2yuv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/blt_reference_yuv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/blt_reference_yuvrev.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/blt_setup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/blt_spanutils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/blt_uberblit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/pixel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/pixmaputils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/region.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/resample.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/resample_kernels.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/resample_stages.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/resample_stages_reference.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/stdafx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/stretchblt_reference.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/uberblit_16f.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/uberblit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/uberblit_gen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/uberblit_resample.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/uberblit_resample_special.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/uberblit_swizzle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/uberblit_ycbcr_generic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/region_sse2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/resample_stages_x64.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kasumi.dir/source/uberblit_ycbcr_sse2_intrin.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libKasumi.a
